Package io.foldright.wrain

package io.foldright.wrain
🪐 Wrain(Inspectable Wrapper Chain), a nano library provides the interfaces to make wrapper instances as an inspectable wrapper chain.
  • Wrapper is core interface, used to enhance the wrapper instances as a wrapper chain; and provides methods to inspect the wrapper chain.
  • Attachable interface is used to enhance the wrapper instances with the attachment storage ability.
See Also:
  • Wrapper
  • Attachable
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.foldright.wrain.utils
    Utils classes for wrain.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    Attachable
    This Attachable interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, provide the attachment storage ability.
    Wrapper<T>
    This Wrapper interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, make wrapper instances as an inspectable wrapper chain(linked list).
